creator: Brandon Marback
description: An old-style propaganda film with out-dated war footage combined with updated propaganda animation elements. The film is set to a remix of the Modeste P. Moussorsky song "A Night on Bald Mountain". This film explores the ideas of mass mis-information campaigns, governmental scare tactics and oudated war tactics in the 21st century.
subject: War Propaganda Animation
War on Terrorism
Government Corruption
title: Scar Strangled Banter
